C) a-i, b-iii, c-iv, d-ii
D) a-ii, b-iv, c-iii, d-i
49. Abscisic acid was independent discovered
by three different researchers and named
as — (Pg. 247, E)
A) Inhibitor-A, abscission-III, dormin
B) Inhibitor-C, abscission-II, dormane
C) Inhibitor-B, abscission-II, dormin
D) Inhibitor-B, abscission-II, dormane
50. The term kinetin was given by —
(Pg. 248, E)
A) Muller et al B) Kurosawa et al
C) Cousins et al D) None of these
51. The foolish seedling disease of rice is
caused by — (Pg. 248, E)
A) Nematode B) Bacteria
C) Fungus D) Virus
52. Auxin was isolated by _(i)_ from _(ii)_
(Pg. 248, E)
EC
A | Francis Wleoptile of oat
on [oe
Francis Cleoptile of canary
on fo
C | F.W. Went | Cleoptile of oat
Ua
F.W. Went | Cleoptile of canary
HI
53. The figure shows — (Pg. 248, E)
: : bs i
(f I I
+ vo “
A) Experiment to show that tip of
coleoptile produces gibberelin
B) Experiment to show that tip of
coleorhiza produces gibberelin
C) Experiment to show that tip of
coleorhiza produces auxin
D) Experiment to show that tip of
coleoptile produces auxin
Paragraph 15.4.3.1
Auxin
